zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick於1410年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 泰龍時，她的父親Conn Baccach O'Neill41歲，母親Alice FitzGerald30歲。她於1425年與Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯萊結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1485年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯萊 易曼德享年75歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick于1410年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 泰龍时，她的父亲Conn Baccach O'Neill41岁，母亲Alice FitzGerald30岁。她于1425年与Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens在苏格兰阿吉爾易斯萊结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1485年在苏格兰阿吉爾易斯萊 易曼德享年75岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: O'Neill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan, Dermot, Liam, Nuala, Bridie, Brigid, Conor, Fintan, John Patrick.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Néill ‘descendant of Niall’, an Irish personal name possibly derived from néal ‘cloud’ (see Neil ).

History: Bearers of this surname mostly claim descent from Niall Noígíallach (Niall of the Nine Hostages), a legendary king of Ireland who flourished in the 5th century. His descendants, the Ui Neill dynasty, dominated Ireland, on and off, from the 6th to the 10th century. The surname itself can be traced with some confidence to one of these descendants, namely Niall Glúndubh mac Aodha (died 919), High King of Ireland from 911 to 919, with a power base in Tyrone, Ulster.

variants.name: O'Neall
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: McNelis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Brendan.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Niallghuis ‘son of Niallghus’, a personal name (intended as complimentary) composed of the personal name Niall (see O'Neill ) + gus ‘vigor’. In Irish the combination of [k] and [n] was generally pronounced [kr], Anglicized as the variants McCreless and McCrillis .

variants.name: O'Neal
meanings: Irish (Longford, Down): variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: O'Niel
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Odneal
meanings: Perhaps an irregular variant of Irish   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Nealon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Declan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Nialláin ‘descendant of Niallán’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of Niall, see O'Neill , Neil .

variants.name: O'Neil
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conn, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Aileen, Eamon, Michael Patrick, Seamus, Sean Patrick, William Sean.
Irish (Mayo, Tipperary): variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Neil
meanings: Scottish, English (Lancashire), and Irish (Munster): from the Gaelic personal name Niall (genitive Néill), possibly derived from Irish néal ‘cloud’. In most cases the name probably represents a shortened form of the derived patronymics McNeill or the comparable Irish O'Neill .
English: variant of   Neal  .

variants.name: O'Neel
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Neill  .

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Johannes ( see John ).

variants.name: Johannah
meanings: feminine form of Johannes ( see John ).

variants.name: Jonna
meanings: contracted form of   Johanna .

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick was born in 1410, in County Tyrone, Ireland, her father, Conn Baccach O'Neill, was 41 and her mother, Alice FitzGerald, was 30. She married Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens in 1425, in Islay, Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1485, in Islay Island, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 75, and was buried in Scotland.

Elle a épousé Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens en 1425, à Islay, Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1485, à Islay Island, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

ko.Loch Gruinart, Islay, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 이슬레이
ko.lifeSummary: Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick(이)가 1410년 아일랜드 카운티 타이론에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Conn Baccach O'Neill(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice FitzGerald(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1425년 스컷랜드 아그이 이슬레이에서 Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 스컷랜드 아그이 이슬레이 이슬랜드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens em 1425, em Islay, Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.Loch Gruinart, Islay, Scotland: ислеи, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna O'Neill of Edenduffcarrick родилась в 1410 г. в местности коунти тироун, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Conn Baccach O'Neill было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice FitzGerald, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Donald Balloch MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens в 1425 г. в местности ислеи, аргилл, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1485 г. в местности ислеи исланд, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.
